TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Tomislav_Nikolińá, title = Tomislav_Nikolińá, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tomislav_Nikolińá} }

S.FORM: Tomislav Nikolińá I 1952 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 15 a romi'ad masofoc ci Tomislav Nikolińá, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Serbia anini i ci Tomislav Nikolińá, patirengan a romi'ad i 2012 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 31 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: to~umis…ĺab~v niko~u…ĺi* i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i to~umis…ĺab~v niko~u…ĺi*, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u s…ôrb~b~via anini i ¶i to~umis…ĺab~v niko~u…ĺi*, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Tomislav Nikolińá I 1952 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 15 a romi'ad masofoc ci Tomislav Nikolińá, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Serbia anini i ci Tomislav Nikolińá, patirengan a romi'ad i 2012 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 31 a romi'ad.
